genre_refs: Arnold Friberg painting 'The Prayer at Valley Forge'
description: A straight reproduction of the well-known representational oil painting 'The Prayer at Valley Forge' by Arnold Friberg (signed lower-right). It depicts General George Washington in a Revolutionary War uniform with a red-lined dark cloak, kneeling in the snow with hands clasped in prayer beside his saddled white horse, in a wintry leafless forest with warm light breaking through. There is no added on-image text, caption, agency seal, or graphic overlay; it is a plain artwork shared as-is (the caption appears only in the tweet text). Because it has essentially no original design treatment, it is not a 'meme' graphic. The Department of Labor uses it as patriotic/religious devotional content invoking national founding mythology and faith. Target audience: a patriotic, religiously inclined public.
